creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: gerald->ports

This is something the emulators/wine port could leverage, but it's beyond 
the realm of this port.  Not sure what to do about this, but I noticed 
that even the GNU/Linux systems I have available do not provide prelink 
by default, and a week or two ago Wine itself was enhanced to work better 
also in the absence of prelink.
